ddls:
CREATE TABLE "carriages" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carriage */,
  "car_type" TEXT /* Type of the carriage (e.g., Sleeper, Double-decker) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of passengers for the carriage */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features available in the carriage (e.g., checked baggage, luxury) */,
  "car_model" TEXT /* Model of the carriage */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the carriage */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the carriage was manufactured */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next maintenance */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the carriage is currently in service */,
  "carriage_class" TEXT /* Class of the carriage (e.g., Economy, Business, First Class) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority record */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the carriage ID from the carriages table */,
  "priority_level" INTEGER /* Priority level for the carriage allocation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the passenger capacity and type */,
  "journey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journey for which the priority is set */,
  "special_requirements" TEXT /* Special requirements for the carriage (e.g., checked baggage, luxury) */,
  "allocated_by" TEXT /* User who allocated the carriage */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the priority was set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_priorities_journey_id FOREIGN KEY ("journey_id") REFERENCES journeys ("journey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_priorities_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES carriages ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the carriage being allocated */,
  "journey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journey for which the carriage is allocated */,
  "allocated_date" TEXT /* Date of allocation */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending station */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers allocated to the carriage */,
  "allocated_by" TEXT /* User who made the allocation */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the allocation is confirmed */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date when the allocation was canceled, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allocations_journey_id FOREIGN KEY ("journey_id") REFERENCES journeys ("journey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allocations_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allocations_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allocations_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES carriages ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allocations_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journeys" (
  "journey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journey */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route for the journey */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending station */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the journey */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the journey */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the journey is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journeys_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journeys_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journeys_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "total_distance" INTEGER /* Total distance of the route */,
  "average_travel_time" TEXT /* Average travel time for the route */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the route is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the station is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the station is located */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the station is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Manager, Staff) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
